_comment: Real-repo seed for vanshitahujaa/archaeo itself (issue #36). Part H.1 dataset format. These are KNOWN-correct entries — verified by the Lead against the actual merged PRs (git log shows gitClient.ts was introduced by PR #40 and linker.ts by PR #42). This dataset is OPT-IN: the harness only runs it when given a local clone path AND a GITHUB_TOKEN (see benchmark/dataset/README.md). The default `pnpm bench` runs the offline fixtures only. commitPin is HEAD at seed time; re-pin if you re-clone at a different revision.

items.notes: LocalGitClient was introduced by PR #40 (feat(integration): git client + GitHub host + auth/cache). Verified by the Lead via `git log -1 -- src/integration/git/gitClient.ts`.
EvidenceLinker was introduced by PR #42 (feat(provenance): provenance engine + risk analyzer — the moat). Verified by the Lead via `git log -1 -- src/provenance/linker.ts`.
